name: pptx
tagline: Creates, edits, and QAs PowerPoint (.pptx/.potx) files via pptxgenjs, XML surgery, and LibreOffice-based visual/schema validation.
verdict: Thorough procedural skill: concrete commands, explicit defaults, strong QA/failure-path coverage, and re-run-safety (idempotent cleanup, overwrite warnings). Weak spots: no scope exclusions (Q02), unpinned mainstream npm/pip installs (S12, low risk), a dense ~730-char description (H03), and no version/changelog anywhere (H08).

highlights.summary: npm/pip installs (pptxgenjs, react-icons, sharp, markitdown, Pillow, defusedxml, lxml) unpinned; well-known packages so warning not fail.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope language anywhere despite a very broad description covering all pptx/potx tasks.
Combo-chart valAxes/catAxes 'two entries each' requirement stated only in prose, no worked JSON example.
